pop.description: Polished, hook-driven music with broad appeal. Features clean production, strong melodies, and high danceability.

lofi.description: Low-fidelity hip hop beats with nostalgic warmth. Often features vinyl crackle, mellow piano, and slow tempos. Creates a cozy, focused atmosphere.

rock.description: Guitar-driven music with electric energy. Ranges from stadium anthems to heavy intensity. Great for high-energy moments.

ambient.description: Atmospheric soundscapes designed for background listening. Minimal melody, long textures, very low energy. Creates calm or meditative environments.

jazz.description: Improvisational music with complex harmonies and swing feel. Ranges from smooth lounge to intense bebop. The classic coffee shop companion.

synthwave.description: Retro-futuristic electronic music inspired by 80s soundtracks. Features synthesizers, driving basslines, and nostalgic neon atmosphere.

indie pop.description: Melodic alternative pop with an independent spirit. Blends catchy hooks with more experimental production. Energetic but approachable.

reggaeton.description: Latin urban music with a dembow rhythm and heavy bass. High danceability and playful energy. Built for the dance floor.

electronic.description: Broad genre of synthesizer-based music. Can range from tense industrial to euphoric dance. High production polish and driving beats.

folk.description: Acoustic, storytelling music rooted in tradition. Warm and intimate with natural instruments. A grounding and reflective listen.

dream pop.description: Hazy, atmospheric pop with reverb-heavy guitars and soft vocals. Creates a floating, cinematic feeling somewhere between waking and sleep.

hip hop.description: Rhythm-driven music built on beats and bars. Covers everything from lyrical storytelling to hard-hitting bangers. Confident and expressive.
